name: spikalabs-design-kit
description: Internal spikalabs design-kit skills with image-first, symbol-led Neo-brutalist guidance derived from the reference website style

interface.shortDescription: Project-scoped spikalabs image-first Neo-brutal UI and brand skills
interface.longDescription: Reusable spikalabs design-kit skills for Codex and compatible agent-skill CLIs. Use them to derive a visual brief, generate an image reference before frontend implementation, and apply symbol-led Neo-brutalist UI, brand, image-to-code, and output-enforcement guidance inside a project.
